50.reason: [The traversal logic is flawed: the function returns early when encountering a leaf, skipping right subtrees of ancestors. Also, the condition `if(T!=NULL)` comes after dereferencing `T`, which causes undefined behavior when T is NULL.]

67.reason: [Calling PREORDER with possibly NULL root leads to dereferencing NULL pointer in PREORDER function.]
